stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Alicante STAR Chart 10-2B from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
You are flying from Manchester to Alicante. Which is the most suitable route passing through Valencia VOR?

options.a:
RUNWAY 10 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 2L (VLC2L); from VLC VOR to MITOS 
RUNWAY 28 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 2N (VLC2N); from VLC VOR to SUMMO
options.b:
RUNWAY 10 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 2L (VLC2L); from VLC VOR to VILNA 
RUNWAY 28 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 2N (VLC2N); from VLC VOR to BESOR
options.c:
RUNWAY 10 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 1L (VLC1L); from VLC VOR to VILNA 
RUNWAY 28 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 1N (VLC1N); from VLC VOR to BESOR
options.d:
RUNWAY 10 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 2L (VLC2L); from VLC VOR to BESOR 
RUNWAY 28 ARRIVALS : VALENCIA 2N (VLC2N); from VLC VOR to VILNA
